title: The Orbital Strike Cannon
description: Nuke And Stab From the /orbitalrod command or a crafting recipe in config.yml and a /orbitalstrike command for strikes anywhere! These Commands are OP only
body:
Orbital Strike Cannon is a lightweight, high-performance Paper plugin that lets players call down devastating energy blasts straight from orbit. Designed for both survival and custom servers, this plugin adds an exciting late-game weapon that feels powerful, balanced, and incredibly fun to use.

🔥 Features

Call in orbital strikes with customizable power, radius, cooldowns, and permissions.

Cinematic blast effects with sounds and a destructive impact zone.

Crafting Recipe customizable via config—change

Survival-friendly: Its A craftable item 

Server-safe: no laggy tasks, optimized for large multiplayer environments.

Paper API support for best performance.

🎮 How It Works

Players activate an Orbital Fishing rod item or OrbitalStrike command, marking a targeted block. After a short charge-up, a beam blasts down from the sky, creating an explosive impact that obliterates anything unlucky enough to stand in its path.
 
📌 Perfect For:

Survival servers with late-game tech

Factions / PvP servers

Minigames and event servers

Sci-fi, futuristic, or custom-themed worlds CREDITS TO CAT (100%)
